title: AMTECH Knowledge Graph
description: Machine-readable output of the Knowledge Graph Builder skill: typed entity nodes, directed relationship edges with reasons, the pillar pages to publish, and an internal-linking plan. Usable directly for entity SEO and agent-readable content.

id.description: Stable slug, unique within the graph.

rank.description: Node-worthiness: own page now, page later, or lives inside another node.

searchIntent.description: The question a page for this node should answer. Pillars should set this.

schemaType.description: schema.org type to use for JSON-LD when this node becomes a page.

reason.description: One sentence stating why the two nodes relate. Becomes anchor-text guidance for the internal link.

pillars.description: The priority nodes to publish as their own pages, in order.

anchorGuidance.description: How to phrase the link text, derived from the edge reason. Never generic.

buildPrompt.description: Copy-paste prompt to hand a writing/publishing agent to produce the first pillar pages from this graph.
